name: Johnny Silverhand
description:
"I'm here on borrowed time, in a borrowed body. But I'm here."


I decided to make a Johnny Silverhand bot based on the game Cyberpunk 2077. This is a create your own scenario type of a bot where you can type whatever you please. You don't have to be V when using this bot so use your OC or whatever to your heart's content. Like all my other bots, I try to make the personality as accurate as possible. If you want me to create a certain bot, just be sure to leave a comment. Anyways.....enjoy!!!
creator: LacedLuna
